Software Engineer

Example Inc is looking for a talented Software Engineer to join our platform team. You will design and build scalable APIs, work on distributed systems, and mentor junior engineers.

What you'll do

  • Design and implement RESTful APIs and microservices
  • Build monitoring and alerting for production systems
  • Participate in on-call rotation
  • Collaborate with product and design teams

Requirements

  • 3+ years of experience with Python or Go
  • Experience with AWS or GCP
  • Strong understanding of SQL databases
  • Computer science degree or equivalent

Benefits

Competitive salary ($120,000 - $160,000), equity package, health insurance, flexible work schedule, learning budget.
